$comment: D-CSUBSET-LABEL-BUDGET-CLIFF (p19 Cluster G c31): a goto-label BEFORE a multi-case switch (`spin: switch(sel){…}`) with `goto spin` jumping back INTO the label — the sqlite3.c `json_parse_restart:`-before-a-huge-switch shape. The `commitAfterPrefix` PEG cut lets labelStmt's probe commit after its fixed leading prefix so the labeled statement parses off the speculative-probe budget, while labelStmt keeps its `Identifier Colon statement` shape so the label stays a real LabelStmt the goto resolves to. sel=feed(1) keeps the switch live + fold-resistant; three goto passes accumulate 20+17+5 = 42. This corpus is the RUNTIME witness (goto-into-a-label-before-a-switch resolves + runs); it is intentionally small — the budget-cliff PARSE red-on-disable is the HIR pin LabelBeforeOversizeStatementParsesPastProbeBudget (>4096 tokens), which trips P0001 'got :' when the cut is removed. Witnessed baseline AND release, x86 PE+ELF + arm64 qemu + macho.
